title: KitsAPI
description: A Bukkit/Spigot API to use kits easily and quickly to start
body:
**Wiki** [Github Wiki](https://github.com/luisBazanDev/KitsAPI/wiki/Getting-started) **Developers** 1. Add the repository ```xml jitpack.io https://jitpack.io ``` 2. Add the dependency ```xml com.github.luisBazanDev KitsAPI 1.2 ``` **Compatible Minecraft versions:** | Minecraft Version | Compatible Versions | Java Version | |-------------------|---------------------|--------------| | **1.20** | 1.0, 1.1, 1.2 | 8+ | | **1.19** | 1.0, 1.1, 1.2 | 8+ | | **1.18** | 1.0, 1.1, 1.2 | 8+ | | **1.17** | 1.0, 1.1, 1.2 | 8+ | | **1.16** | 1.0, 1.1, 1.2 | 8+ | **License**
[MIT](https://github.com/luisBazanDev/KitsAPI/blob/main/LICENSE)
